fun_fact: The bicycle is one of the coolest vehicles ever invented — zero emissions, no fuel costs, and good exercise. But you have to be "rather brave" to cycle on Indian roads; our cities are designed for cars not cycles. Btw millions in India do cycle daily — not by choice, but because they have no alternative. But what if we reimagined our cities to make cycling a real choice — not just for those who have no option or "the brave ones"? [Read more →](https://www.ceew.in/blogs/5-steps-to-a-cycle-friendly-future-for-india)
